summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Probe Insurance Innovation HTML page. All 15 test cases passed successfully including page layout, navigation, form functionality, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Page loads with proper fonts (Syne, Cormorant Garamond) and styling
Navigation bar displays JOYN logo, Marketplace/Creator Studio links, and Hire Probe CTA
Breadcrumb navigation (Home -> Marketplace -> Probe) with working links
Hero section shows correct stats: 7 agents, 2.5h time, 3 interventions, 6 outputs
All 7 agents displayed in roster: Intake, Scout, Architect, Challenger, Environ, Run, Debrief
Debrief synthesis card has dark background with agent input sources
3 intervention tags correctly placed on Intake, Challenger, and Debrief cards
6 named outputs section displays all deliverables with correct producers
Engagement model section shows 3 intervention points
Experiment protocol section displays 6 data protocol items correctly
Brief form contains all required fields with correct Web3Forms key (5b972adb-feba-4546-a657-02d5e29b6e29)
Form fields are fillable and functional with proper validation
Mobile responsive design with brief bar and responsive layouts
Footer displays correctly with logo, tagline, and navigation links
All buttons and links are clickable and properly configured
